notes:
The previous updates had destroyed the game's performance. For 1 day, the game was playable correctly. 
Since today's patch (Update 5.6.0 / 22 jan 2025), the game simply does not start. I have tried several versions of Proton, nothing works. The game crashes while loading EAC.

After contacting the game support regarding the current situation of the game on Linux, here is their response:

"Thank you for reaching out to THE FINALS support team. We truly appreciate you bringing this situation to our attention and for providing those additional details---it means a lot.

I understand how frustrating it can be when things don’t work as expected, especially regarding compatibility. While our game can run on Linux platforms, I regret to inform you that we don’t have official support for Linux at this time. Unfortunately, this may lead to significant challenges for Linux users and could impact your ability to play smoothly.

Although I can’t guarantee that official Linux support will be added in the future, please know that our development team is aware of this concern. We’re always looking for ways to improve, and there’s a possibility that progress could be made down the line.

Thank you for your understanding and patience. If you have any other questions or concerns, feel free to reach out to us. We're always here to help.

Best regards,
Fuzzy Wuzzy

"

Hoping that this is a goodbye and not a farewell.
